commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Edict. Literally, "dogma "(Haydock) a word used in this sense, (Acts xv. 16.) and by Demosthenes (Tirinus)
Mourning. The most effectual means of redress, is to do works of penance for past transgressions, 1 Corinthians xi. 31. (Worthington)
